info.description: Backend API for the SITCON Camp 2026 game.
info.title: Camp 2026 Game API

get.description: Lists activities that can grant sitones to the current player.
Returns one activity and its sitone reward information.

post.description: Claims a sitone reward from an activity when the player is eligible.
User-facing endpoint. Validates the stable auth token from the issued game URL and writes it to the camp2026_auth cookie.
Clears the camp2026_auth cookie for the current browser session.

Set-Cookie.description: camp2026_auth=; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Lax; Max-Age=0

get.description: Lists public crafting recipes and acquisition hints.
Lists all collectible item definitions and acquisition hints.
Lists all collectible sitone definitions and acquisition hints.

post.description: Uses sitones and items to craft a new sitone.

get.description: Lists crafting recipes visible to the current player, including whether each recipe is currently craftable.
Returns one crafting recipe visible to the current player.
Confirms the HTTP process is alive and the database is reachable.
Lists the current player's match history. Results can be filtered by mode and status.

post.description: Starts a Knowledge King player match with selected sitones.

get.description: Returns match status, participants, current question, or completed result for the current player.

post.description: Submits an answer, returns correctness and explanation, and advances match state.
Finalizes a match and grants open power from the result.

get.description: Returns the current authenticated player's profile, team, and open power balance.
Lists items owned by the current player. Items are bought with open power and used for crafting.
Returns one item stack owned by the current player.
Returns the current player's spendable open power balance.
Lists the current player's open power ledger records.
Returns the current player's QRCode token metadata for identity and match pairing.
Lists sitones owned by the current player. Sitones are gained from activities and used in matches or crafting.
Returns one sitone owned by the current player.
Returns the current authenticated player's gameplay loop summary for the home page.

post.description: Resolves a player QRCode and returns available user actions for match pairing or staff verification.

get.description: Lists items that can be purchased with open power.
Returns one purchasable shop item.

post.description: Purchases an item with open power and adds it to the current player's inventory.
Lets staff verify a player activity from a QRCode token and optionally advance a mission.
Lets staff grant open power, sitones, or items to a player resolved from a QRCode token.

description.example: Complete the booth challenge to receive a sitone.

acquisitionHint.example: Buy from the shop with open power.

explanation.example: The MIT License is a permissive open source license.

prompt.example: Which license is commonly used for open source projects?

AuthCookieAuth.description: User auth cookie. Send as `Cookie: camp2026_auth=<base64url-auth-token>`.
AuthCookieAuth.name: Cookie
